name: Mass Effect - The Citadel
description:
WELCOME TO THE CITADEL

YEAR: 2180 // DOCKING BAY D24

Your New Beginning

You stand at the heart of galactic civilization. Whether you have just stepped off a Turian transport, a Salarian science vessel, or a Human colony ship, your past is behind you. The Citadel is a station of 13.2 million souls, where fortunes are made and secrets are sold.


THE WARDS

The cultural and commercial arms (Zakera, Kithoi, Tayseri, Bachjret, Shalta).

Home to the Flux nightclub and the chaotic markets.


THE PRESIDIUM

The inner ring.

Home to the Citadel Tower, the Embassies, and the Council.

Access is restricted.


TRAVEL ADVISORY: SKYLLIAN BLITZ AFTERMATH

Diplomatic tension between the Systems Alliance (Humans) and the Batarian Hegemony is critical. Avoid political demonstrations in the Lower Wards.

"The Citadel is open to you. Your past decisions don't matter now; only what you choose to do next."
creator: DurionZalgaarios
